creator: mmoll@freebsd.org
text:
- Add patch to support i18n
  o taken from https://github.com/mdub/clamp/pull/43
  o will be needed for the next release of sysutils/rubygem-hammer_cli
  o tested against current sysutils/rubygem-hammer_cli
- Take maintainership
